name: Alfredo Sauce#2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, process cottage cheese and garlic until smooth.
2. Add flour, lemon juice, basil, mustard, pepper, and salt (if desired). Process until well blended.
3. Pour the mixture into a saucepan.
4. Cook over medium heat until thickened.
5. Do not boil!
6. Serve over pasta; sprinkle with chopped tomatoes.
